story.text:
# 📖 ZK Tale 27: Data Availability Prophecy 🌕
**act** · swordsman · knowledge · zero_knowledge

The Data Availability Prophecy. Blade 63 (111111), Moon Phase 🌕 Full Moon, V(π,t) terms: [A_h(τ), T_∫(π), ρ, Value]. Vertex ⟨1,1,1,1,1,1⟩. DAS, Proto-Danksharding, EIP-4844, Celestia. Finite-but-sufficient temporal storage; network-level ρ through DAS.

> *Execution needs proof; reconstruction needs data. Blobs separate these concerns, making data temporary yet sufficient, cheap yet available, distributed yet verifiable. Data availability is the foundation beneath all scalability prophecies.*

## Edges out

- *follows* → [[ZK Tale 28: Bridge Between Worlds 🌗]]
- *extends* → [[A_h(τ) — Holonic Temporal Memory]]
- *extends* → [[ρ — Agent Maturity]]

## Edges in

- [[ZK Tale 26: Vulnerability Codex 🌕]] *follows* →
- [[Zero Knowledge Spellbook v2.0]] *defines* →
